STYLE_GUIDE.md.summary: Markdown style guide defining shadcn-inspired UI rules, forbidding gradients, and giving implementation hints for the coding agent.

index.html.summary: Full HTML file for the Snake game with score, best score, status, speed control, on-screen direction buttons, and a game canvas.

script.js.summary: Full JavaScript file after the fix: initializes after layout is ready, sizes the canvas reliably using its rendered dimensions, preserves game state better on resize, and keeps pause/restart/status behavior working consistently.

styles.css.summary: Full stylesheet for the Snake game with a polished shadcn-inspired layout, large responsive playfield, and controls styled for the arcade interface.
